name: node-long
title: node-long
summary: Class for representing 64-bit two's-complement integer value
description:
Class for representing 64-bit two's-complement integer value
A Long class for representing a 64 bit two's-complement integer value
derived from the Closure Library for stand-alone use and extended with
unsigned support.
.
This is a class used by various modules that does not use newer bigint.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-long because Class for representing 64-bit two's-complement integer value.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-long as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-long with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-long --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
